name: Platformer Stack (stand-on / ride a crate proof)
description: Reuse proof for 1.9.0 dynamic-on-dynamic stacking (the resolveBodies stacking step): a pushable crate is solid-to-dynamics, so a player stands on a crate, crates stack, and a rider rides a crate that is pushed or carried — resolved in dependency order so a rider settles on the crate's final position. Built from move-platformer + velocity + collider with no host code; the high ledge is what a crate lets the player reach.
